Format is [+-]{field_name} (e.g. +name for ascending sorting by name or -name for descending sorting).If sorting by multiple fields is required add another GET parameter, e.g. sort=+name&sort=-date. To sort by inner field, e.g. sort project by manager name use dot as a field separator (sort=manager.name).

post.summary: Returns the list of vacations filtered according to the given arguments

200.description: If all filtered vacations available for current employee

204.description: If no vacations with passed filtering params found

206.description: If part of filtered vacations are not available for current employee

403.description: If all vacations with passed filtering params are not available for current employee

204.description: If no sick leave with passed filtering params found

parameters.name: departmentManagerLogins
parameters.description: List of department manager logins to search for their employees

parameters.name: employeeSubStrings
parameters.description: List of substring criteria to search for employees by their names or logins

parameters.name: fetchForCopy
parameters.description: Flag indicating whether to retrieve schedules for copied absences, default is false

parameters.name: fetchSickLeaves
parameters.description: Flag indicating whether to retrieve schedules that include sick leaves, default is true

parameters.name: fetchWorkingWeekends
parameters.description: Flag indicating whether to retrieve schedules that include working weekends, default is true

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date of the schedule availability period to retrieve

parameters.name: officeIds
parameters.description: List of office ids to search employees belong to these offices

parameters.name: projectIds
parameters.description: List of project IDs to filter availability schedule by project

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: List of fields for sorting the retrieved availability schedules. Supported sorting fields: 'login', 'russianName', 'latinName'

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date of the schedule availability period to retrieve

nameDuplicate.description: Flag that shows if there are employees with the same name
Flag that shows if there are employees with the same name

departmentManagerRequestsCount.description: Number of vacation requests from department employees. Filled in only for type = NON_APPROVED_VACATION

forwardedRequestsCount.description: Number of vacation requests forwarded from different department. Filled in only for type = NON_APPROVED_VACATION

sickLeaveNumbers.description: Numbers of overdue sick leaves. Filled in only for type = OVERDUE_SICK_LEAVE

required.description: Flag that employee cannot be removed from notification list

classType.description: Objects class type that has the following permissions

permissions.description: Set of allowed permissions for a specified object

notifyAlso.description: List of logins of employees to notify about sick leave
List of logins of employees to notify about sick leave

childNodeList.description: List of child nodes, could be in initial response if overall response small, or need additional requests to get child nodes

daysForPeriod.description: Effort for filtration period (in work days)

daysTotal.description: Effort total for node (in work days)

expandable.description: True if this node potentially could be expanded and contains subnodes

id.description: Id of element, if it is project it has id, not all elements have id, for example if task grouped, their parent task name dont have id, because it is not entity just grouping elemnt

nodeType.description: Type of returned node, could be VACATION

nodeUuid.description: Uuid of current node used to connect additional requests in UI

parentNodeUuid.description: Uuid of parent node which was 'clicked' on UI

StatisticNodeDTO.title: StatisticNodeDTO
StatisticNodeDTO.description: Represent node in statistic tree structure, it could be additionally 'open' in UI, and contain additional 'branches' and 'leafs'

childNodeList.description: List of child nodes, could be in initial response if overall response small, or need additional requests to get child nodes

daysForPeriod.description: Effort for filtration period (in work days)

daysTotal.description: Effort total for node (in work days)

expandable.description: True if this node potentially could be expanded and contains subnodes

id.description: Id of element, if it is project it has id, not all elements have id, for example if task grouped, their parent task name dont have id, because it is not entity just grouping elemnt

nodeType.description: Type of returned node, could be VACATION

nodeUuid.description: Uuid of current node used to connect additional requests in UI

parentNodeUuid.description: Uuid of parent node which was 'clicked' on UI

timeOffs.description: Time offs for employee including vacations, sick leaves, day offs

StatisticReportNodeDTO.title: StatisticReportNodeDTO
StatisticReportNodeDTO.description: Represent node in statistic tree structure, it could be additionally 'open' in UI, and contain additional 'branches' and 'leafs'

endDate.description: Date of period end for which calculate statistic

startDate.description: Date of period begin for which calculate statistic

permissions.description: A set of current employee permissions to change the vacation
